top3.sql:
WITH height_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(height) AS max_height,
        MIN(height) AS min_height
    FROM Player
    WHERE height IS NOT NULL
),
players_in_range AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_name,
        pa.finishing
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    CROSS JOIN height_stats hs
    WHERE p.height BETWEEN hs.min_height AND hs.max_height
      AND p.height = hs.max_height OR p.height = hs.min_height
      AND pa.finishing IS NOT N...

WITH height_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(height) AS max_height,
        MIN(height) AS min_height
    FROM Player
    WHERE height IS NOT NULL
),
players_in_range AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_name,
        pa.finishing
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    CROSS JOIN height_stats hs
    WHERE p.height BETWEEN hs.min_height AND hs.max_height
      AND p.height = hs.max_height OR p.height = hs.min_height
      AND pa.finishing IS NOT N...

WITH height_extremes AS (
    SELECT 
        player_name,
        height,
        finishing
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE p.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player WHERE height IS NOT NULL)
       OR p.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player WHERE height IS NOT NULL)
      AND pa.finishing IS NOT NULL
),
avg_rates AS (
    SELECT 
        player_name,
        AVG(finishing) AS avg_finishing
    FROM height_extremes
    GROUP BY...

WITH height_bounds AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(height) AS max_h,
        MIN(height) AS min_h
    FROM Player
    WHERE height IS NOT NULL
),
filtered_players AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_name,
        pa.finishing
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    JOIN height_bounds hb ON p.height = hb.max_h OR p.height = hb.min_h
    WHERE pa.finishing IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    player_name
FROM filtered_players
ORDER BY finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

),

WITH height_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(height) AS max_height,
        MIN(height) AS min_height
    FROM Player
    WHERE height IS NOT NULL
),
players_in_range AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_name,
        pa.finishing
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    CROSS JOIN height_stats hs
    WHERE p.height BETWEEN hs.min_height AND hs.max_height
      AND p.height = hs.max_height OR p.height = hs.min_height
      AND pa.finishing IS NOT N...

top_error_messages.message_head: ORDER BY clause should come after UNION ALL not before
